Navbar Injection Lifecycle (loadNavbar → fetch → applyLanguageAfterNavbar → normalizeNavbarLinks)

nodes.label: Shared Navbar/Footer Injection via fetch()
nodes.rationale: Navbar and footer are loaded asynchronously via fetch with multiple fallback path candidates. After injection, language and active-link state are re-applied via applyLanguageAfterNavbar(). An inline fallback is built if all fetch candidates fail, ensuring the site works even without a server.
